---
title: "artifact_diagnostic"
author: "Geoffrey Bruder"
date: "2026-05-04"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# 1. Does the artifacts file exist?
file.exists("artifacts/project_artifacts.RData")

# 2. What objects are inside it?
env <- new.env()
load("artifacts/project_artifacts.RData", envir = env)
sort(ls(envir = env))

# 3. Quick sanity checks on the main objects
if(exists("test_baked", envir = env)) {
  tb <- get("test_baked", envir = env)
  dim(tb); names(tb)[1:30]
  # check predicted probs length
  if(exists("platt_pred", envir = env)) length(get("platt_pred", envir = env))
  if(exists("xgb_pred_prob", envir = env)) length(get("xgb_pred_prob", envir = env))
}

```

```{r}
# 1. List objects inside artifacts
env <- new.env()
load("artifacts/project_artifacts.RData", envir = env)
print(sort(ls(envir = env)))

# 2. Confirm test_baked rows and predicted vector lengths
tb <- get("test_baked", envir = env)
cat("nrow(test_baked) =", nrow(tb), "\n")
if(exists("platt_pred", envir = env)) cat("length(platt_pred) =", length(get("platt_pred", envir = env)), "\n")
if(exists("xgb_pred_prob", envir = env)) cat("length(xgb_pred_prob) =", length(get("xgb_pred_prob", envir = env)), "\n")
if(exists("raw_probs", envir = env)) cat("length(raw_probs) =", length(get("raw_probs", envir = env)), "\n")

```


```{r}
# 1. List objects in artifacts
env <- new.env()
load("artifacts/project_artifacts.RData", envir = env)
print(sort(ls(envir = env)))

# 2. Confirm test_baked and predicted vector lengths
tb <- if(exists("test_baked", envir = env)) get("test_baked", envir = env) else NULL
cat("test_baked rows:", if(!is.null(tb)) nrow(tb) else "MISSING", "\n")
for(nm in c("platt_pred","pred_prob","raw_probs","xgb_pred_prob","rf_pred_prob")){
  if(exists(nm, envir = env)) cat(nm, "length:", length(get(nm, envir = env)), "\n")
}
# 3. Quick ROC sanity
for(nm in c("roc_xgb","roc_rf","roc_enh","roc_base")){
  if(exists(nm, envir = env)){
    roc_obj <- get(nm, envir = env)
    cat(nm, "has sensitivities:", !is.null(roc_obj$sensitivities), "and specificities:", !is.null(roc_obj$specificities), "\n")
  }
}


```


```{r}
# 1. Confirm classes and basic structure
env <- new.env()
load("artifacts/project_artifacts.RData", envir = env)
objs <- sort(ls(envir = env)); print(objs)

# 2. Inspect cal_plot
if("cal_plot" %in% objs) {
  cp <- get("cal_plot", envir = env)
  cat("cal_plot class:", paste(class(cp), collapse = " / "), "\n")
  if(inherits(cp, "ggplot")) print(summary(cp))
  if(inherits(cp, "grob")) print(cp)
}

# 3. Inspect one ROC object structure
if("roc_xgb" %in% objs) {
  rx <- get("roc_xgb", envir = env)
  cat("roc_xgb: length(sens)=", length(rx$sensitivities), " length(spec)=", length(rx$specificities), "\n")
  cat("roc_xgb sample sens[1:5]:", head(rx$sensitivities,5), "\n")
}

# 4. Inspect test_baked and pred_prob
tb <- get("test_baked", envir = env)
cat("test_baked rows:", nrow(tb), "cols:", ncol(tb), "\n")
cat("pred_prob summary:\n"); print(summary(tb$pred_prob))
cat("pred_prob NA count:", sum(is.na(tb$pred_prob)), "\n")
cat("first 6 pred_prob:", head(tb$pred_prob,6), "\n")

# 5. Quick check for empty data frames used for plotting
for(nm in c("top20_rf","top20_xgb")) {
  if(nm %in% objs) {
    obj <- get(nm, envir = env)
    cat(nm, "class:", paste(class(obj), collapse="/"), " nrow:", if(is.data.frame(obj)) nrow(obj) else NA, "\n")
  }
}

```


```{r}
# 1. show current working dir and project root
cat("getwd():", getwd(), "\n")
cat("here::here():", here::here(), "\n")

# 2. show candidate artifact files and absolute paths
root_art <- "artifacts/project_artifacts.RData"
rmds_art <- file.path("Rmds", "artifacts", "project_artifacts.RData")
cat("root exists:", file.exists(root_art), "\n", "abs root:", normalizePath(root_art, winslash="/", mustWork=FALSE), "\n")
cat("rmds exists:", file.exists(rmds_art), "\n", "abs rmds:", normalizePath(rmds_art, winslash="/", mustWork=FALSE), "\n")

# 3. search the repo for any project_artifacts.RData (safe, fast)
files <- list.files(path = ".", pattern = "project_artifacts\\.RData$", recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE)
cat("All matches:\n"); print(files)

```

```{r}
# Diagnostic: run from project root
cat("getwd():", getwd(), "\n")
cat("here::here():", here::here(), "\n")

cfg_file <- here::here("config.yml")
cat("config.yml exists:", file.exists(cfg_file), " path:", normalizePath(cfg_file, winslash="/", mustWork=FALSE), "\n")
cfg <- if (file.exists(cfg_file)) yaml::read_yaml(cfg_file) else list(artifacts_dir = "Rmds/artifacts")
cat("config artifacts_dir:", cfg$artifacts_dir, "\n")

proj_file_rel <- file.path(cfg$artifacts_dir, "project_artifacts.RData")
proj_file_abs <- normalizePath(proj_file_rel, winslash = "/", mustWork = FALSE)
cat("proj_file_rel:", proj_file_rel, "\n")
cat("proj_file_abs (normalizePath):", proj_file_abs, "\n")
cat("file.exists(proj_file_rel):", file.exists(proj_file_rel), "\n")
cat("file.exists(proj_file_abs):", file.exists(proj_file_abs), "\n")
cat("file.access(proj_file_abs, 4) [readable? 0=ok]:", file.access(proj_file_abs, 4), "\n")

cat("\nList artifacts dir contents (if exists):\n")
print(list.files(path = dirname(proj_file_rel), full.names = TRUE))

cat("\nSearch repo for any project_artifacts.RData matches:\n")
print(list.files(path = ".", pattern = "project_artifacts\\.RData$", recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE))

```
```{r}
file.exists("Rmds/artifacts/project_artifacts.RData")
file.info("Rmds/artifacts/project_artifacts.RData")[, c("size","mtime")]

```

```{r}
# run in project root R session
env <- new.env()
load("Rmds/artifacts/project_artifacts.RData", envir = env)

# show provenance saved by the artifact chunk
if ("artifact_provenance" %in% ls(envir = env)) {
  prov <- get("artifact_provenance", envir = env)
  print(prov)
} else {
  message("No artifact_provenance found in artifacts.")
}

# inspect test_baked raw target sample and full unique values
if ("test_baked" %in% ls(envir = env)) {
  tb <- get("test_baked", envir = env)
  # show classes and a sample of the raw target column if present
  cat("Classes:\n"); print(sapply(tb[c("target_attrit","pred_prob","pred_decile")], class))
  cat("\nFirst 200 unique raw target values (if present):\n")
  if ("target_raw" %in% names(tb)) {
    print(unique(head(as.character(tb$target_raw), 200)))
  } else {
    # if target_raw not present, show first 200 values of target_attrit before mapping
    print(unique(head(as.character(tb$target_attrit), 200)))
  }
  cat("\nFull target_attrit counts (post-mapping):\n")
  print(table(tb$target_attrit, useNA = "ifany"))
} else {
  message("test_baked not found in artifacts.")
}

```


# ARTIFACT EXPORT

```{r}
# 1. Load artifacts env and save test_baked CSV for Tableau
env <- new.env()
load("Rmds/artifacts/project_artifacts.RData", envir = env)
tb <- env$test_baked

# Optional: sanitize for Tableau Public (drop or hash PseudoID)
# tb$PseudoID <- NULL
# or hash:
# if (requireNamespace("digest", quietly = TRUE)) tb$PseudoID <- sapply(as.character(tb$PseudoID), digest::digest)

# Write CSV for Tableau
write.csv(tb, file = "Rmds/artifacts/test_baked_for_tableau.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# 2. Export canonical PNGs (adjust object names if your Rmd uses different names)
# If your Rmd already creates ggplot objects named decile_counts_plot_object, decile_obs_plot_object, roc_overlay_plot_object, cal_plot, rf_varimp_plot_object, xgb_varimp_plot_object:
ggsave("Rmds/artifacts/decile_counts.png", plot = decile_counts_plot_object, width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)
ggsave("Rmds/artifacts/decile_obs.png",    plot = decile_obs_plot_object,    width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)
ggsave("Rmds/artifacts/roc_overlay.png",   plot = roc_overlay_plot_object,   width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave("Rmds/artifacts/reliability.png",   plot = cal_plot,                   width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)
ggsave("Rmds/artifacts/rf_varimp.png",     plot = rf_varimp_plot_object,     width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave("Rmds/artifacts/xgb_varimp.png",    plot = xgb_varimp_plot_object,    width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# 3. Optional: export a SHAP example PNG for the slide (select a row and plot)
# Example: create a single-customer SHAP bar chart and save as PNG (adapt to your shap object)
# idx <- 1
# shap_df <- as.data.frame(env$shap_vals)[idx, , drop = FALSE]
# shap_long <- tibble::enframe(as.numeric(shap_df), name = "feature", value = "shap") %>% arrange(desc(abs(shap)))
# p_shap <- ggplot(shap_long[1:20,], aes(x = reorder(feature, shap), y = shap)) + geom_col() + coord_flip()
# ggsave("Rmds/artifacts/shap_example.png", plot = p_shap, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)

```


```{r}
# list exported files
list.files("Rmds/artifacts", pattern = "decile_counts|decile_obs|roc_overlay|reliability|rf_varimp|xgb_varimp|shap_example|test_baked_for_tableau_public.csv", full.names = TRUE)

# peek at the sanitized CSV
readr::read_csv("Rmds/artifacts/test_baked_for_tableau_public.csv", n_max = 6)

# check image sizes (optional)
file.info(list.files("Rmds/artifacts", pattern = "\\.png$", full.names = TRUE))[, c("size","mtime")]

```

# TabPu - Cleaning script
```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
infile <- "Rmds/artifacts/test_baked_for_tableau_public.csv"
tb <- read_csv(infile, show_col_types = FALSE)

# Standardize column names
clean_names <- function(x) {
  x %>%
    str_trim() %>%
    str_replace_all("\\s+", "_") %>%
    str_replace_all("\\.+", "_") %>%
    str_replace_all("[^A-Za-z0-9_]", "") %>%
    tolower()
}
names(tb) <- clean_names(names(tb))

# Rename common columns to canonical names
tb <- tb %>%
  rename_with(~ ifelse(. == "pred_prob" | . == "pred_prob", "pred_prob", .), everything()) %>%
  rename_with(~ ifelse(. == "pred_decile" | . == "pred_decile", "pred_decile", .), everything()) %>%
  rename_with(~ ifelse(. %in% c("target_attrit","target_attrit"), "target_attrit", .), everything())

# Coerce types
if ("pred_prob" %in% names(tb)) tb$pred_prob <- as.numeric(tb$pred_prob)
if ("target_attrit" %in% names(tb)) tb$target_attrit <- as.integer(tb$target_attrit)

# Convert decile to discrete ordered factor then to character for Tableau
if ("pred_decile" %in% names(tb)) {
  tb <- tb %>% mutate(pred_decile = as.integer(pred_decile))
  tb <- tb %>% mutate(pred_decile = ifelse(is.na(pred_decile), NA, as.character(pred_decile)))
}

# Drop internal/system columns if present
sys_cols <- names(tb)[grepl("proj_file|path|artifact|created_at|pseudoid", names(tb), ignore.case = TRUE)]
tb <- tb %>% select(-any_of(sys_cols))

# Optional: collapse one-hot education into single categorical (example)
edu_cols <- names(tb)[grepl("^education_level_", names(tb))]
if (length(edu_cols) > 0) {
  tb <- tb %>% mutate(education_level = coalesce(!!!syms(edu_cols)))
  # If coalesce not appropriate, you can create a single label via which.max logic; skip if not needed
  tb <- tb %>% select(-any_of(edu_cols))
}

# Write cleaned CSV for Tableau Public
out <- "Rmds/artifacts/test_baked_for_tableau_public_clean.csv"
write_csv(tb, out)
message("Wrote cleaned CSV: ", out)

```

# Mapping generator
```{r}
# auto-generate mapping CSV for Tableau
library(readr); library(dplyr); library(stringr)
infile <- "Rmds/artifacts/test_baked_for_tableau_public_clean.csv"
tb <- read_csv(infile, show_col_types = FALSE)

# helper to infer role and notes
infer_role <- function(name, col) {
  if (name %in% c("pred_prob")) return(list(type="Number (decimal)", role="Score / Measure", notes="Model output (0-1)"))
  if (name %in% c("pred_decile")) return(list(type="String (discrete)", role="Segment / Dimension", notes="Equal-count ntile 1..10"))
  if (name %in% c("target_attrit")) return(list(type="Integer (0/1)", role="Target", notes="0 = existing, 1 = attrited"))
  if (is.numeric(col)) return(list(type="Number (decimal)", role="Feature", notes="Numeric feature (preprocessed)"))
  if (is.character(col) || is.factor(col)) return(list(type="String", role="Dimension", notes="Categorical"))
  return(list(type="Unknown", role="Unknown", notes=""))
}

mapping <- tibble(field_name = names(tb)) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    sample_type = typeof(tb[[field_name]]),
    infer = list(infer_role(field_name, tb[[field_name]])),
    type = infer$type,
    role = infer$role,
    notes = infer$notes,
    display_label = str_replace_all(field_name, "_", " ") %>% str_to_title()
  ) %>%
  select(field_name, display_label, type, role, notes)

out <- "Rmds/artifacts/tableau_field_mapping_auto.csv"
write_csv(mapping, out)
message("Wrote mapping: ", out)

```

# Hella_cleanPU

```{r}
# Paste and run this in your R console (project root)
# Produces cleaned CSV and mapping for Tableau Public
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)

infile <- "Rmds/artifacts/test_baked_for_tableau_public.csv"
out_clean <- "Rmds/artifacts/test_baked_for_tableau_public_clean.csv"
out_map   <- "Rmds/artifacts/tableau_field_mapping_auto.csv"

if (!file.exists(infile)) stop("Input artifact not found: ", infile)

tb <- read_csv(infile, show_col_types = FALSE)

# 1. Normalize column names to snake_case
clean_names <- function(x) {
  x %>% str_trim() %>% str_replace_all("\\s+", "_") %>%
    str_replace_all("\\.+", "_") %>% str_replace_all("[^A-Za-z0-9_]", "") %>%
    tolower()
}
names(tb) <- clean_names(names(tb))

# 2. Canonicalize common names (robust to small variations)
# --- Replace the failing rename_with block with this robust mapping ---
# (run this after tb <- read_csv(...), and before the mutate step)

# helper: mapping function for names
map_name <- function(x) {
  case_when(
    x %in% c("predprob","pred_prot","pred_prot","pred_prob") ~ "pred_prob",
    x %in% c("preddec","pred_dec","pred_decile")             ~ "pred_decile",
    x %in% c("target_attrit","target_attr","target_raw","target") ~ "target_attrit",
    TRUE ~ x
  )
}

# apply mapping to current names
new_names <- map_chr(names(tb), map_name)

# if mapping created duplicates, make them unique and report
if (any(duplicated(new_names))) {
  dup_names <- new_names[duplicated(new_names) | duplicated(new_names, fromLast = TRUE)]
  message("Duplicate target names detected after mapping: ", paste(unique(dup_names), collapse = ", "))
  # make unique by appending suffixes
  new_names <- make.unique(new_names, sep = "_dup")
  message("Renamed duplicates using make.unique; new names appended with _dup suffix where needed.")
}

# assign the new names back
names(tb) <- new_names

# quick sanity print of first 40 names so you can confirm
cat("Column names after mapping (first 40):\n")
print(head(names(tb), 40))
# --- end replacement ---

# 3. Create helper fields and coerce types
tb <- tb %>%
  mutate(
    pred_prob = as.numeric(pred_prob),
    pred_prob_pct = ifelse(is.na(pred_prob), NA_real_, round(pred_prob * 100, 1)),
    # try to coerce decile to integer; if not possible, keep NA and create string from original
    pred_decile = suppressWarnings(as.integer(pred_decile)),
    pred_decile_order = pred_decile,
    pred_decile_str = if_else(!is.na(pred_decile), as.character(pred_decile),
                              if_else(!is.na(pred_decile) & pred_decile == 0, "0", as.character(pred_decile))),
    target_attrit = as.integer(target_attrit),
    target_label = if_else(!is.na(target_attrit) & target_attrit == 1L, "Attrited", "Existing")
  )

# 4. Collapse one-hot groups into single categorical fields (if present)
# Education
edu_cols <- names(tb)[grepl("^education_level_", names(tb))]
if (length(edu_cols) > 0) {
  tb <- tb %>%
    mutate(education_level = pmap_chr(select(., all_of(edu_cols)), function(...) {
      vals <- list(...); idx <- which(as.numeric(vals) == 1)[1]
      if (is.na(idx)) return(NA_character_)
      nm <- names(vals)[idx]; str_remove(nm, "^education_level_")
    })) %>%
    select(-all_of(edu_cols))
}

# Income
inc_cols <- names(tb)[grepl("^income_category", names(tb))]
if (length(inc_cols) > 0) {
  tb <- tb %>%
    mutate(income_category = pmap_chr(select(., all_of(inc_cols)), function(...) {
      vals <- list(...); idx <- which(as.numeric(vals) == 1)[1]
      if (is.na(idx)) return(NA_character_)
      nm <- names(vals)[idx]; str_remove(nm, "^income_category_")
    })) %>%
    select(-all_of(inc_cols))
}

# Card category
card_cols <- names(tb)[grepl("^card_category", names(tb))]
if (length(card_cols) > 0) {
  tb <- tb %>%
    mutate(card_category = pmap_chr(select(., all_of(card_cols)), function(...) {
      vals <- list(...); idx <- which(as.numeric(vals) == 1)[1]
      if (is.na(idx)) return(NA_character_)
      nm <- names(vals)[idx]; str_remove(nm, "^card_category_")
    })) %>%
    select(-all_of(card_cols))
}

# 5. Remove PseudoID and obvious system/path columns for Tableau Public
sys_cols <- names(tb)[grepl("proj_file|path|artifact|created_at|pseudoid|user|home", names(tb), ignore.case = TRUE)]
if (length(sys_cols) > 0) tb <- tb %>% select(-any_of(sys_cols))

# 6. Reorder to put metadata first (helpful in Tableau)
meta <- c("pred_prob","pred_prob_pct","pred_decile","pred_decile_str","pred_decile_order","target_attrit","target_label")
meta <- intersect(meta, names(tb))
tb <- tb %>% select(all_of(meta), everything())

# 7. Write cleaned CSV
write_csv(tb, out_clean)
message("Wrote cleaned CSV: ", out_clean)

# 8. Auto-generate a simple field mapping CSV for documentation
infer_role <- function(name, col) {
  if (name %in% c("pred_prob")) return(list(type="Number (decimal)", role="Score / Measure", notes="Model output (0-1)"))
  if (name %in% c("pred_prob_pct")) return(list(type="Number (decimal)", role="Display", notes="pred_prob * 100"))
  if (name %in% c("pred_decile","pred_decile_str")) return(list(type="String (discrete)", role="Segment", notes="Equal-count decile 1..10"))
  if (name %in% c("pred_decile_order")) return(list(type="Number (whole)", role="Sort order", notes="Numeric order for decile sorting"))
  if (name %in% c("target_attrit")) return(list(type="Integer (0/1)", role="Target", notes="0 = existing, 1 = attrited"))
  if (is.numeric(col)) return(list(type="Number (decimal)", role="Feature", notes="Numeric feature (preprocessed)"))
  return(list(type="String", role="Dimension", notes="Categorical"))
}

mapping <- tibble(field_name = names(tb)) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    sample_type = typeof(tb[[field_name]]),
    infer = list(infer_role(field_name, tb[[field_name]])),
    type = infer$type,
    role = infer$role,
    notes = infer$notes,
    display_label = str_replace_all(field_name, "_", " ") %>% str_to_title()
  ) %>%
  select(field_name, display_label, type, role, notes)

write_csv(mapping, out_map)
message("Wrote mapping: ", out_map)

# 9. Quick sanity print
cat("Clean CSV rows:", nrow(tb), "columns:", ncol(tb), "\n")
cat("Top fields:", paste(head(names(tb), 12), collapse = ", "), "\n")

```

```{r}
library(readr); library(dplyr); library(stringr)

clean_in  <- "Rmds/artifacts/test_baked_for_tableau_public_clean.csv"
clean_out <- "Rmds/artifacts/test_baked_for_tableau_public_clean.csv"

tb <- read_csv(clean_in, show_col_types = FALSE)

# Identify duplicate target columns (pattern target_attrit*)
dup_targets <- names(tb)[grepl("^target_attrit", names(tb))]
# Keep the first occurrence, drop the rest
if (length(dup_targets) > 1) {
  keep <- dup_targets[1]
  drop <- setdiff(dup_targets, keep)
  tb <- tb %>% select(-any_of(drop))
  message("Dropped duplicate columns: ", paste(drop, collapse = ", "))
} else {
  message("No duplicate target columns to drop.")
}

# Safety: ensure target_attrit is integer 0/1
if ("target_attrit" %in% names(tb)) tb <- tb %>% mutate(target_attrit = as.integer(target_attrit))

# Re-write cleaned CSV (overwrite)
write_csv(tb, clean_out)
message("Wrote cleaned CSV (duplicates removed): ", clean_out)

```
